Body.Content:
If you have enabled Show declined events in New Outlook, you can choose to hide declined events in your Outlook iOS or Android app. Go to Settings > Calendar > Hide Declined Events. This will filter out declined events from your mobile calendar, while keeping those events visible in New Outlook.

GA date: January CY2026

message.Title: Outlook: Hide Declined Meetings in Outlook Mobile
